title: BG11 hypersaline agar plates
steps: Add the following to a beaker and dissolve using a stir bar on a magnetic stir plate. %s %s
Add Milli-Q water to bring total volume to 1 L
While waiting for autoclave cycle to finish, set up desired number of sterile petri dishes or other culturing plates in a sterile biohood.
Remove media from autoclave and let cool until just warm enough to touch.
Pour media into each petri dish and let solidify.* *TIP: Before agar solidifies, use a sterile pipette tip to move any bubbles that may form to the edges of the petri dish.
creator: Emilie J Skoog
